title: Educazione siberiana
author: Nicolai Lilin
description: Growing up in a criminal underworld. The life of a Siberian boy educated by an entire criminal community to become a living contradiction, namely an 'honest criminal", and leading the existence of a tattooist, communicating with patience and discipline in the way of understanding the underworld. Transnistria, a land of everyone and no one, a crossroads of international trade and stories of men.
